page_meta.base_description: Stardewdle is the daily Stardew Valley guessing game. Take on a new challenge every day across three modes — Villager, Crop and Fish — and test your Stardew Valley knowledge.

want_more.title: Want more ?
want_more.description: Check out the biggest hub for all dle games.

about.title: About
about.discover: Welcome to Stardewdle, the daily Stardew Valley guessing game! Test your knowledge across three modes — Villager, Crop and Fish — with a new puzzle every day.
about.disclaimer: Stardewdle is an unofficial fan project. Stardew Valley is created by ConcernedApe; all characters and artwork belong to their respective owners. This project is not affiliated with, sponsored by, or endorsed by ConcernedApe.

game_modes.title: Three daily modes
game_modes.description: Villager compares six attributes (gender, region, birthday, marriageable, age). Crop compares five crop attributes (growth, price, regrow, type, season). Fish compares five fish attributes (difficulty, behavior, season, weather, size). A fresh puzzle for each mode, every day.

dle_games.title: More -dle games
dle_games.description: Enjoyed Stardewdle? Explore the whole family of daily -dle games in the hub linked in the menu.

commitment.title: Daily challenge
commitment.description: Come back each day for new villagers to guess, keep your streak alive, and share your results with friends.

inspiration.title: Inspiration
inspiration.description: Inspired by Wordle and the many wonderful -dle guessing games.

credit.title: Credits
credit.description: Made by a fan, for fans of Stardew Valley. 🌱

privacy.title: Privacy
privacy.description: We keep it simple — your progress and streak are stored locally in your own browser.

about.thanks: Thanks for playing, and happy farming!

how_to_play_classic.title: How to Play Stardewdle: Villager Mode
how_to_play_classic.introduction_description: Guess the secret Stardew Valley villager of the day. Analyze six attributes; each guess gives color-coded feedback and directional arrows to guide you.
how_to_play_classic.attributes_description: Villager Mode compares these six attributes:
how_to_play_classic.attribute_item_2: • Region: where they live (Town, Mountain, Forest, Beach, Desert, Sewers, Ginger Island).
how_to_play_classic.attribute_item_3: • Season: their birthday season (Spring, Summer, Fall, Winter).
how_to_play_classic.attribute_item_4: • Birthday: the day of the month they were born (1–28).
how_to_play_classic.attribute_item_5: • Marriageable: whether you can marry them (Yes or No).
how_to_play_classic.feedback_item_1: • Green: exact match with the secret villager.
how_to_play_classic.feedback_arrows: Arrows appear on Birthday and Age:
how_to_play_classic.feedback_arrow_up: • Arrow Up (↑): the secret villager's value is HIGHER (later birthday / older).
how_to_play_classic.feedback_arrow_down: • Arrow Down (↓): the secret villager's value is LOWER (earlier birthday / younger).
how_to_play_classic.step_1: Make your first guess of any villager from the search list.
how_to_play_classic.step_2: Watch each attribute tile flip in sequence, revealing color-coded feedback.
how_to_play_classic.step_3: Read the green and red tiles to spot matching and non-matching attributes.
how_to_play_classic.step_4: Use the arrows on Birthday and Age to narrow the range.
how_to_play_classic.step_5: Make your next guess based on all the feedback received.
how_to_play_classic.step_6: Continue until you correctly identify the secret villager!
how_to_play_classic.step_7: Return daily for a new villager to guess in Villager Mode.
how_to_play_classic.strategy_tip_1: • Start with villagers you know well to establish a baseline of attributes.
how_to_play_classic.strategy_tip_2: • Region and Season narrow the pool fast — many villagers share them.
how_to_play_classic.strategy_tip_3: • Use arrows to eliminate whole groups by birthday or age.
how_to_play_classic.strategy_tip_4: • Age is ordinal: Child < Teen < Adult.
how_to_play_classic.strategy_tip_5: • A villager must match ALL green feedback at once.
how_to_play_classic.strategy_tip_6: • Gender, Region, Season and Marriageable match exactly (no arrows).
how_to_play_classic.daily_challenge_description: Return each day for a new secret villager. Track your streak and share your result with friends.

how_to_play_classic.title: How to Play: Crop Mode
how_to_play_classic.introduction_description: Guess the secret Stardew Valley crop of the day by comparing five attributes. Each guess gives color-coded feedback and directional arrows to guide you.
how_to_play_classic.attribute_item_3: • Regrow: does it keep producing after harvest? (Yes/No).
how_to_play_classic.attribute_item_4: • Type: Vegetable, Fruit, Flower, Forage or Seed.
how_to_play_classic.attribute_item_6: • Tip: green is an exact match; orange on Season means a partial overlap.
how_to_play_classic.feedback_item_1: • Green: exact match with the secret crop.
how_to_play_classic.feedback_arrows: Arrows appear on Growth and Price.
how_to_play_classic.feedback_arrow_up: • Arrow Up (↑): the secret crop's value is HIGHER.
how_to_play_classic.feedback_arrow_down: • Arrow Down (↓): the secret crop's value is LOWER.
how_to_play_classic.step_1: Make your first guess of any crop from the search list.
how_to_play_classic.step_2: Watch each attribute tile flip in sequence, revealing color-coded feedback.
how_to_play_classic.step_3: Read the green and red tiles to spot matching and non-matching attributes.
how_to_play_classic.step_4: Use the arrows on Growth and Price to narrow the range.
how_to_play_classic.step_5: Make your next guess based on all the feedback received.
how_to_play_classic.step_6: Continue until you correctly identify the secret crop!
how_to_play_classic.step_7: Return daily for a new crop to guess in Crop Mode.
how_to_play_classic.strategy_tip_1: • Start with crops you know well to establish a baseline of attributes.
how_to_play_classic.strategy_tip_2: • Type and Season narrow the pool fast — many crops share them.
how_to_play_classic.strategy_tip_3: • Use the arrows to eliminate whole groups by growth time or price.
how_to_play_classic.strategy_tip_4: • Regrow is a simple Yes/No — it splits the pool in half.
how_to_play_classic.strategy_tip_5: • A crop must match ALL green feedback at once.
how_to_play_classic.strategy_tip_6: • Regrow, Type and Season match exactly (no arrows).
how_to_play_classic.daily_challenge_description: Return each day for a new secret crop. Track your streak and share your result with friends.

how_to_play_classic.title: How to Play: Fish Mode
how_to_play_classic.introduction_description: Guess the secret Stardew Valley fish of the day by comparing five attributes. Each guess gives color-coded feedback and directional arrows to guide you.
how_to_play_classic.attribute_item_1: • Difficulty: how hard the fish is to catch.
how_to_play_classic.attribute_item_2: • Behavior: how it moves — Floater, Dart, Smooth, Mixed or Sinker.
how_to_play_classic.attribute_item_3: • Season: the season(s) you can catch it.
how_to_play_classic.attribute_item_6: • Tip: green is an exact match; orange on Season means a partial overlap.
how_to_play_classic.feedback_item_1: • Green: exact match with the secret fish.
how_to_play_classic.feedback_arrows: Arrows appear on Difficulty and Size.
how_to_play_classic.feedback_arrow_up: • Arrow Up (↑): the secret fish's value is HIGHER.
how_to_play_classic.feedback_arrow_down: • Arrow Down (↓): the secret fish's value is LOWER.
how_to_play_classic.step_1: Make your first guess of any fish from the search list.
how_to_play_classic.step_2: Watch each attribute tile flip in sequence, revealing color-coded feedback.
how_to_play_classic.step_3: Read the green and red tiles to spot matching and non-matching attributes.
how_to_play_classic.step_4: Use the arrows on Difficulty and Size to narrow the range.
how_to_play_classic.step_5: Make your next guess based on all the feedback received.
how_to_play_classic.step_6: Continue until you correctly identify the secret fish!
how_to_play_classic.step_7: Return daily for a new fish to guess in Fish Mode.
how_to_play_classic.strategy_tip_1: • Start with fish you know well to establish a baseline of attributes.
how_to_play_classic.strategy_tip_2: • Behavior and Weather narrow the pool fast — many fish share them.
how_to_play_classic.strategy_tip_3: • Use the arrows to eliminate whole groups by difficulty or size.
how_to_play_classic.strategy_tip_4: • Season can partially match (orange) when it overlaps.
how_to_play_classic.strategy_tip_5: • A fish must match ALL green feedback at once.
how_to_play_classic.strategy_tip_6: • Behavior, Season and Weather match exactly (no arrows).
how_to_play_classic.daily_challenge_description: Return each day for a new secret fish. Track your streak and share your result with friends.

how_to_play_classic.title: How to Play: Dish Mode
how_to_play_classic.introduction_description: Guess the secret Stardew Valley cooked dish of the day by comparing five attributes. Each guess gives color-coded feedback and directional arrows to guide you.
how_to_play_classic.attribute_item_3: • Ingredients: number of ingredients in the recipe.
how_to_play_classic.attribute_item_4: • Source: how the recipe is learned — Queen of Sauce, Friendship, Skill, Starter or Special.
how_to_play_classic.attribute_item_5: • Buff: the buff the dish grants when eaten (or None).
how_to_play_classic.attribute_item_6: • Tip: green is an exact match; orange on Buff means a partial overlap.
how_to_play_classic.feedback_item_1: • Green: exact match with the secret dish.
how_to_play_classic.feedback_arrows: Arrows appear on Energy, Price and Ingredients.
how_to_play_classic.feedback_arrow_up: • Arrow Up (↑): the secret dish's value is HIGHER.
how_to_play_classic.feedback_arrow_down: • Arrow Down (↓): the secret dish's value is LOWER.
how_to_play_classic.step_1: Make your first guess of any dish from the search list.
how_to_play_classic.step_2: Watch each attribute tile flip in sequence, revealing color-coded feedback.
how_to_play_classic.step_3: Read the green and red tiles to spot matching and non-matching attributes.
how_to_play_classic.step_4: Use the arrows on Energy, Price and Ingredients to narrow the range.
how_to_play_classic.step_5: Make your next guess based on all the feedback received.
how_to_play_classic.step_6: Continue until you correctly identify the secret dish!
how_to_play_classic.step_7: Return daily for a new dish to guess in Dish Mode.
how_to_play_classic.strategy_tip_1: • Start with dishes you cook often to establish a baseline of attributes.
how_to_play_classic.strategy_tip_2: • Source and Buff narrow the pool fast — many dishes share them.
how_to_play_classic.strategy_tip_3: • Use the arrows to eliminate whole groups by energy, price or ingredient count.
how_to_play_classic.strategy_tip_4: • About half of all dishes grant no buff — that split alone cuts the pool in two.
how_to_play_classic.strategy_tip_5: • A dish must match ALL green feedback at once.
how_to_play_classic.strategy_tip_6: • Source matches exactly; orange on Buff means a partial overlap.
how_to_play_classic.daily_challenge_description: Return each day for a new secret dish. Track your streak and share your result with friends.
